name: Buck Ram
description: American songwriter, music executive, popular music producer and arranger
abstract: Samuel "Buck" Ram (November 21, 1907 – January 1, 1991) was an American songwriter, and popular music producer and arranger. He was one of BMI's top five songwriters/air play in its first 50 years, alongside Paul Simon, Kris Kristofferson, Jimmy Webb, and Paul McCartney.

about_quotes.speaker: Gerald Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: I was now working for a man by the name of Buck Ram... So Buck Ram wanted me to work for him. He had The Platters, okay.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gerald Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
